     the Fermi energy is     3.2778 ev

!    total energy              =   -8183.88378960 Ry
     estimated scf accuracy    <          2.8E-09 Ry
     smearing contrib. (-TS)   =      -0.23968492 Ry

     The total energy is F=E-TS. E is the sum of the following terms:
     one-electron contribution = -191596.76860713 Ry
